word: G3351 - μετοικίζω - metoikízō - met-oy-kid'-zo - Carry away

sections.paragraph: இலக்கண சொல்வகை / Part(s) of speech: Verb / வினைச்சொல்
to transfer settlers; to cause to remove into another land
ஆங்கில மூலம் / Original in English: From the same as G3350; to transfer as a settler or captive, that is, colonize or exile: - carry away, remove into.
